◎译　　名　谁杀了泰迪熊
◎片　　名　Who Killed Teddy Bear
◎年　　代　1965
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　别　剧情 / 犯罪
◎语　　言　英语
◎上映日期　1965

◎导　　演　约瑟夫·凯茨 Joseph Cates
◎编　　剧　阿诺德·德雷克 Arnold Drake

◎简　　介  

　　A grim police detective lieutenant embarks on a one-man crusade to track down a depraved sex maniac in this forgotten neo-noir masterpiece of American independent cinema. With its sleazy, taboo-busting nature, the film was refused certification for a theatrical release in 1965.
